sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70178" key="nemesi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεμεσίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n70178.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Nemesis-stone,</tr_> a stone with magical properties, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
